name: Cheese Snack Rounds
recipeIngredient: 1 Jar (5 oz) Sharp pasteurized process cheese spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cheese spread and baking mix until well combined.
2. Shape into a roll, about 1 inch in diameter, on a lightly floured cloth-covered board.
3. Roll in sesame seeds, pressing lightly if necessary.
4. Wrap and refrigerate until firm, at least 2 hours.
From the Kitchen of Gary & Margie Hartford [Eugene, Oregon]:
Heat oven to 375°F (190°C).
Cut roll into 1/4 inch slices.
Place on a lightly greased cookie sheet.
Bake until golden brown, 8 to 10 minutes.
